productName: A1 SMB CRM MAX Web integrations admin bootstrap contract
guardrails: Keep the admin bootstrap fetch pointed at GET /v1/integrations/_admin-bootstrap.
Keep Authorization: Bearer sourced from the a1sid token only when a token is available; do not crash when localStorage is unavailable.
Keep structured ApiError handling for backend envelopes and keep SCHEMA_DRIFT messages pointing to the first Zod issue path.
Keep the AdminBootstrap Zod schema aligned to integrations, outbound statuses, trigger configs, vault audit, OAuth connect actions, and metadata.
Do not expose GitHub tokens, Gemini keys, authorization headers, bearer tokens, cookies, or API keys in eval output.
